## Goal
Describe the quality gate or observability capability to add.

## Scope
- [ ] CI workflow
- [ ] Test gates
- [ ] Metrics/logging
- [ ] Alerting/reporting

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement CI step(s)
- [ ] Add pass/fail criteria
- [ ] Add docs for local reproduction

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CI runs backend + frontend quality checks
- [ ] Integration smoke test is automated
- [ ] Key metrics (success rate/latency/error rate) are observable

## Test Plan
- [ ] Intentionally break a check and confirm CI blocks merge
- [ ] Validate metrics/logs can be queried
